chatsubo.name: The Chatsubo
chatsubo.desc: A low bar for professional expatriates; you could drink there for a week and never hear two words in Japanese.

street.name: Ninsei Street
street.desc: Neon and rain on the strip of Ninsei. Holograms flicker over the noodle stalls and the crowd moves like one tired animal under the dead-channel sky.

chinatown.name: Chinatown
chinatown.desc: A warren of stalls and steam. Vendors hawk black-market chips and bowls of something hot while lawbots watch from the corners.

bodyshop.name: The Body Shop
bodyshop.desc: A clinic for new flesh and chrome. Jars line the shelves and the surgeon's smile never wavers.

justice.name: Justice Booth
justice.desc: A cramped booth walled with monitors. A Compu-Judge frowns down from the big screen; a Compu-Lawyer waits on the small one.
